full_text:
Chang Lin (Bohuai) 常林 (伯槐)
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Chang Lin (常林), styledBohuai (伯槐), was born in Wen county, Henei commandery. Advised Cao Pi to not lead the army against Su Bo and Tian Yin but to leave it to a vassal. Died aged 82. Chang Lin was affiliated with Chen Yan and the Wei Kingdom. Chang Lin lived during the Later Han Dynasty and Three Kingdoms periods of Chinese history.
